title: Allow same color be used for different statuses within the same status column
excerpt: Saw the recent announcement on getting 10 new colors. But instead of more colors, can we please get the option to use the same color more than once?

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Saw the recent announcement on getting 10 new colors. But instead of more colors, can we please get the option to use the same color more than once?

posts.author: CJDC (Chris Coles)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this would be a very useful feature

posts.author: nah (Nah)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, there are so many colours, sometimes I feel like I’m looking at a dashboard designed for 2 year olds.

posts.author: mattcave (Matthew Cave)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. Sometimes we have multiple scenarios that could be considered “done” that don’t require a different color. We use as many similar shades of green as we can, but it makes our board look like a rainbow. It would be nice to have several different labels for one color so we can see at a glance what needs attention and what doesn’t.

posts.author: dmckearan (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: We also need this. Since Statuses are by far the most useful column type for Automation, we are using multiple status columns on boards to accomplish what we need. The colors become meaningless when they are everywhere. In addition to using the same color multiple times, it would be useful to have the option of a colorless status column.

posts.author: Brobb (Buffy Robbins)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the option on the road map? I too could use the ability to have the same color, or no color as an option.

posts.author: Twila (Twila Gates)
posts.cookedHtml: This is really needed. I have users that are disturbed by all the colors. Being able to use same color for different statuses would be most appreciated!

posts.author: Tomas (Tomas Iglesias)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed with the above! We need status of the same colour and, therefore, unlimited number of status!

posts.author: alexcamp (Alexandre Campagna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to support this request. I have many status labels, and wish I could use the same color on a couple of them. As Mattcave mentionned, we try to use similar colors but it only makes our board look like a rainbow. It’s distracting.
At least give us the option for a few “Custom” colors that we can re-use as needed.

posts.author: alexcamp (Alexandre Campagna)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we bump this? I’ve seen many different request for the same functionality now.

posts.author: JNewman2020 (Jennifer)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% Agree. The boards were built to be aesthetically pleasing but wow it looks ugly when I can’t group similar statuses by color. Please add this feature!

posts.author: Mle (Emily)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I would like to use the deadline feature for multiple statuses, but they have to be green in order mark them as complete.

posts.author: JM_K (Joanna Maria Kucharska)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please! Our dashboards look now like a rainbow and not a professional tool to manage projects and Clients…

posts.author: jdsb (Jeff Blanchard)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a very simple ask, and an important one for maintaining sanity on boards with many statuses, which (often) do not need unique colors.

posts.author: Tolik (Anatoly)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this topic? Have to use drop down column instead of more useful status type

posts.author: RickAllen (Rick Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Please I know lots of color is part of the Monday.com brand but please please allows us to use the same color for status’

posts.author: KaiChung (Kai C Chung)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree with this comment:

Agreed, there are so many colours, sometimes I feel like I’m looking at a dashboard designed for 2 year olds.

posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com
Is there any good update of this request chain, please?

posts.author: j-shubham (Shubham Jha)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe instead of giving fixed set of colors, allowing users to choose a color from the picker will be really great.

posts.author: AdamMcBeth (Adam McBeth)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be very appreciative of this too!

posts.author: Gabriela.Monday (Gabriela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please allow to:

  • Repeat colors on different labels

  • Create Custom colors with a Colors Dialog Box that has a Custom Tab to create colors using Hex numbers and a slider.

Thank you

posts.author: Horizonsong (Karo Zieminski)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be amazing. We have a very strong visual identity and this feature would address some of our needs.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team has a need for this feature as well. As many others have stated we have many statuses that are equivalent to done and having them all one shade of green would help clean up the look of the board a lot. Too many colors and shades of colors can make the board quite overwhelming to look at.

posts.author: gabriela (Gabriela)
posts.cookedHtml: I got here looking for the same feature. I have multiple status on the Table view but I would like to merge some of those colors together so that the Gantt chart is not so overwhelming.

posts.author: hGX5a4 (hGX5a4)
posts.cookedHtml: This is completely INSANE that something so simple as having an option of NO COLOR or SAME COLOR isn’t an option for something we pay $$$$$ tons of money for.

posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be brilliant. You could use a color for statusses that belong to one department or a certain category of actions for example. Would make boards look sooooo much cleaner.

posts.author: Schteevynn (Stephen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally agree – AND ALSO, allow restriction on the number of choices in a Dropdown column, the same way we can with People column. If we could restrict Dropdown selections to one selection we wouldn’t need to use so many Status columns, and then boards wouldn’t end up looking like such a circus.

I think that the option to color the TEXT in a status rather than the cell background would be a welcome relief for the eyes, too.

posts.author: User129438 (John S)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely insane that it doesn’t allow you to use the same color, it literally takes more coding to stop you from using the same color than it would to allow it. This would take like 5 minutes for them to patch as a toggle and yet it’s been years and nothing has changed.

posts.author: VN86 (Vlad N)
posts.cookedHtml:
I WANT same color be used for different statuses within the same status column …!!!

PLEASE… SOON…!!!

posts.author: paul.painter (Paul Painter)
posts.cookedHtml: This features is a must, please add this to your development.

posts.author: heather.oneill (Heather O'Neill)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! This would be super helpful to use the same color more than once in a status column.

posts.author: JohnV (JOHN Vizler)
posts.cookedHtml: Same colour over multiple status would really be useful.

posts.author: VN86 (Vlad N)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday.com, We want to be able to use same colors for different statuses within the same “status” Column…

Is this really that hard to do? REALLY? REALLY?

Please!!!

posts.author: sean.jackson (Sean Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Since status is our only option for a single select column, a single-color option is fundamental.

posts.author: Tommy004 (Tommy)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes…PLEASE allow this, its been like 4 years. Such a simple feature to allow for. I noticed Monday also actually REMOVED colors from the filters section, like WHY? Users should have control over what colors are used on their own boards, like all other PM tools have.

posts.author: vbickov (Volodymyr Bykov)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature was requested in 2020, and no one bothered to remove a simple restriction?! I’ve been using Monday for several years now, but these small, annoying things make me want to run away.

posts.author: lhughes_lg (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree - this would be very helpful!

posts.author: Midgar777 (Pete Butler)
posts.cookedHtml: I would find this very helpful too! In one of our boards we have a few different types of review: internal, external and client. While these all have different requirements and actions associated with them, it would be helpful if they were all the same colour instead of 3 different shades of pink

posts.author: cpsl (Adele P)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also need this. I often want to use a standard color for most values and then just one or two accent colors to indicate a special status within a column. It’s hard to make those special statuses pop and draw the eye to them quickly when every status must be a different color.

Can someone from the Monday team please give an update on where this falls? It’s four years old and still very much so needed.

posts.author: Marlene (Marlene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please liberate this soon.
It is extra helpfull to organise and help teams to understand which status are attached to each team. Or when Status correspond to specifique fases.
example:
fase 1 (status a, b, c) , fase 2 (status d, e, f), fase 3 (status g, h, i)…

Still not getting a way to visually identify the status that are commun to more than 1 team/Fase. Example:

  • FASE 1 (status a , b, c) FASE 2 (status b, d, e).
    In here, one status (b) will/can be used in different fases OR by different teams in the progress on this task.
    Of course we can create collone status for each fase/team, but this is not helping to have a unique/basique/general vue of the status of this task, (all in one status).

posts.author: Charay (Chris Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with everyone’s comments here. It’s disappointing to see this thread go back as far as 2020 with no response or remediation. While overall, I really appreciate the flexibility of this platform, but will say this is one thing that specifically stands out to me as a glaring oversight. When there are so many colors displayed it degrades the perception of professionalism of the software and the business using it.

posts.author: Tuko (Luis Alberto Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeap, I agree! Also having a color picker, could be amazing.

posts.author: emilyelle (Emily)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add this feature! Would be super helpful for us, too.

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: Any chance of an update on this. My users always use this as an example of how poor monday.com is to use

posts.author: rebeccalooijen (Rebecca)
posts.cookedHtml: I would really urgently like this option as well!!! It should be an easy thing to fix…

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community! Thank you for your continued feedback on the ability to select the same color for different status labels. We’ve noted all of your use cases and understand the importance of this feature.

Although we do not have this feature on the product roadmap at this time, our roadmap continues to change due to evolving capabilities and capacity, and we may be able to add this feature to the roadmap in the future. We will update you in the coming quarter with any changes to this status. We appreciate your input and will continue to prioritize this feature with all of you in mind!

posts.author: CJEStaff (Jodi Portnoy)
posts.cookedHtml: I find it so odd that this is not something that Monday would not accommodate. I can’t imagine that it would be so hard to keep the full spectrum available in the status column, so that users decide how much color they want. My users call Monday “cartoony” and I agree that, especially if you have many status fields, you don’t want or need all of them to have unique colors. Please re-assess.

posts.author: granto (Grant Olson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed that this is needed - it’s such a basic ask - why hasn’t this been implemented after 5 YEARS?

posts.author: ACD (Alexandre Derycz)
posts.cookedHtml: Here to add my voice as well! Statuses are incredibly useful, and allowing the same color to be used would allow boards AND teams to be way more organized and gain much needed visual clarity. Cannot wait for this feature enough!

posts.author: CKJ (Curtis Johnston)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to set any HEX code as a status color.

And to set multiple statuses to the same color, or no color.

posts.author: Marlene (Marlene)
posts.cookedHtml:
CJEStaff:

Hi Shannon,

this topic is considered as Solved, but the request stills on.
same color in status is very important.

Could you please inform where we are on this ? should we open a second and independent request?

thank you
